title: IntegrationRecord
description: One row in the integrations registry produced by `claw discover`. Mirrors PLAN.md §4.3. A registry snapshot is a JSON object {"records": [IntegrationRecord, ...], "discovered_at": <ts>} stored at opencode+/opencode_claw/.compactor/registry/integrations.<ts>.json (local-only, gitignored).

source.description: Repo-relative path of the file the scanner read to produce this record.

type.description: Kind of integration. Drives downstream classification rules.

c_layer.description: Architecture layer (see opencode+/docs/architecture-c1-c4.md). Optional — assigned by classify step.

linux_layer.description: Linux-boot taxonomy layer (see PLAN.md §2). Optional — assigned by classify step.

endpoint.description: URL or unix socket where this integration is reachable. `null` if not network-addressable.

depends_on.description: Other integration ids this one needs at boot time.

tools.description: MCP tools advertised by this integration. Empty when not an MCP server or when not yet probed.

config_keys.description: Env keys the integration reads. SECRET-like values MUST be redacted; only the key name is recorded. See AGENTS.md §4 redact rules.

status.description: Live state at discovery time. `running` requires evidence from the `health`/`process` scanner.

skill_id.description: Linked skill in `.ai/skills/` if any. `null` flags this record as a gap (Phase 2 candidate).

evidence.description: HARD constraint: at least one `path:line` (or `path:line-range`) anchor in the repo. Without evidence the record is rejected.

tool_dir.description: Directory of executable, MCP root, or compose service context (see tool-node.schema.json).

name.description: Human-readable name; defaults to MCP tools[].name or id suffix when omitted.

description.description: From SKILL.md, compose labels, or MCP server description.

target.description: filesystem | web | llm | agents | host | database | …

mcp_usage.description: JSON string: MCP tools/list surface (inputSchema, annotations).

_reserved.description: Reserved for future health/cost metadata; synced to Neo4j Tool._reserved_json.
